title: Unfortunate exit for Knysna United
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The A team of the Knysna...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The A team of the Knysna United rugby club bombed out of the SWD coastal A League this past weekend, when they went down 44-41 against a spirited Prince Albert side.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The A team of the Knysna United rugby club bombed out of the SWD coastal A League this past weekend, when they went down 44-41 against a spirited Prince Albert side."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The match was played at the Loerie Park Sports Stadium, Knysna, and at half-time, United were still in the game, trailing by one point only, at 24-25.","html":"The match was played at the Loerie Park Sports Stadium, Knysna, and at half-time, United were still in the game, trailing by one point only, at 24-25."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The visitors breached United's defences at will, and this will be an area of concern for the team going forward.","html":"The visitors breached United's defences at will, and this will be an area of concern for the team going forward."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Offensively, the home team did well to cross the tryline a couple of times themselves, but in big matches the old rugby saying stands firm, \"stoic defence wins matches\".","html":"Offensively, the home team did well to cross the tryline a couple of times themselves, but in big matches the old rugby saying stands firm, \"stoic defence wins matches\"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Uphill battle","html":"Uphill battle"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For United, it was always an uphill battle from the start, having the task of registering a bonus-point win against Prince Albert - to make a semi-final spot possible.","html":"For United, it was always an uphill battle from the start, having the task of registering a bonus-point win against Prince Albert - to make a semi-final spot possible."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It wasn't to be for the men in green, but they can certainly take pride from the way they took the fight to all of their opponents this year.","html":"It wasn't to be for the men in green, but they can certainly take pride from the way they took the fight to all of their opponents this year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A few of those matches were pretty close, and had they prevailed, it would've been a different story.","html":"A few of those matches were pretty close, and had they prevailed, it would've been a different story."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Instead, it will now be Prince Albert playing against Silverstars from George."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For Knysna, Jade Taute, Pieter Makielie (two), Gift Ngxwashula and Herschell Manual (two) scored tries. Taute was successful with two conversions and one penalty.","html":"For Knysna, Jade Taute, Pieter Makielie (two), Gift Ngxwashula and Herschell Manual (two) scored tries. Taute was successful with two conversions and one penalty."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Players thanked","html":"Players thanked"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Chairman of the club, Cameron Jantjies, thanked all the players for their commitment throughout the year.","html":"Chairman of the club, Cameron Jantjies, thanked all the players for their commitment throughout the year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Also to our faithful supporters, who travelled with us come rain or shine, we appreciate your presence at our matches sincerely.","html":"\"Also to our faithful supporters, who travelled with us come rain or shine, we appreciate your presence at our matches sincerely."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Also a word of thanks to our sponsors, Buco Knysna, Charlton Moolow and Solid Paving, who stuck by us.","html":"\"Also a word of thanks to our sponsors, Buco Knysna, Charlton Moolow and Solid Paving, who stuck by us."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Next year, we will once again fight the good fight. Past players and young new players are more than welcome to join the team as we look to rebuild.\"","html":"\"Next year, we will once again fight the good fight. Past players and young new players are more than welcome to join the team as we look to rebuild.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
